reviews.review_description: Someone please play with me, lobby feels so lonely :(

Do not purchase this,  game is actively broken now... 

Devs are no longer updating,
laser broken,
physic broken,
avatars broken, (invisible)

Bad buy. Save your money this is NOT FUN. 
The only thing this game dose well is freeze and crash.
I cannot get this to work at all.

reviews.review_title: Nearly perfect is 5 star please fix
reviews.review_description:
Edit: Update really changed the break physics and there has been no contact from devs. If they intended the change it would be nice to hear why. I can barely get a ball to go past the half way line with my strongest break. Is this game abandoned?




I really am impressed with this sim! It's almost unbelievable how accurate the physics are. 

Anyone that says this game is lacking free movement has not thought about what people would do with free reign. As soon as they are able some people would try to distract their opponent. 

I would love to have a top down view of the table when spectating my opponent.

I would like to be able to see my opponents rating while we shoot.
please update this cool game
There was an update recently, after this update users and players can't break the balls well, I kindly ask the person responsible for the update to fix this bug
Great game lots of fun

Let's go dev, add offline mode to the original. Why is there a second seperate app for offline. 

Are you improving the AI? Are you adding different game modes? 

Please keep supporting the app.

Hello this is a very good game except I take pictures using the camera thing on the menu with my husband and the pictures say saved but I can't seem to find the pictures anywhere at all I need help with this please? Thank you
The physics are really really good I’m a professional snooker player but I would like a snooker update but overall really good
The opponent AI is terrible
I am a IRL Pool hobbyist and I’m really impressed at the realism and physics of this game. It is truly fun in a unique way if you enjoy pool!
Been launching the game and getting into the hustle bar but I can't see anyone and my points on the board are not available…what could be the issue? Has anyone else discovered such a thing

I had fun but I had to look up the rules.
Also, I was getting motion sick when I got teleported after my turn. Better just leave the player in the same spot instead.

reviews.review_title: What I dreamed VR would be!
reviews.review_description:
Amazing game. Impressive on so many levels.

+ physics are fantastic
+ environment including table, balls ans surroundings are great
+ the integrated media player/browser is excellent
+ mechanics are great (with quests limitations) and work great with an attachment, see video https://twitter.com/VRSportz/status/1509457553264107520?t=ZhpVoP65iLdW3tTIZL1PZQ&s=19

Its just like having an amazing pool table in your home which you can play when you like with a big screen youtube player (which also is a browser if you click on Google icons).

Massive props to developers. This game should be in the main store.

Can't wait for them to add Snooker!
I went through the whole tutorial and cannot get get the cue to slide back and forth.

developer_response.body: Press and hold your front hand index trigger.

reviews.review_description:
5 stars to encourage development. 

features I would enjoy:

Table speed control. Plays very slow, most real tables are at least 30% faster, in the real world you tap the ball and it drifts longer. Breaking seems like you are doing it underwater. Side pockets are dead.

A lets try that again control for practicing, to reset the ball positions. 

The cue, what? 5 mm tip?  I dont think you can buy a snooker cue like that. 

Physics of banking is accurate, spot on the wall works for 3 rail kicks. Push shots work.  

Controls are good, the lock in place mechanism could lead to bad habits tough, not sure if there is a better solution there. Moving around the table makes things easy eith the grip control, the teleport option I won't be using. 

Master level for the bot should have more accurate position play, some showcase of talent beyond not missing. 

Great job though, you tube is a bit ad intrusive, in a real bat that would be turned off quick. one fun thing would be one of those phone app controlled jukeboxes for bad song battles, you buy credits to setup the playlist, torment your friends.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback,

You can undo / retry your last shot in practice mode by pressing "B" Button.

reviews.review_description: SO I LIKED THIS GAME THE WAY IT WAS BEFORE U CHANGED THE CONTROLS. FYI WHEN YOU PLAY POOL YOU DO NOT MOVE YOU FORWARD HAND BACK AND FORTH, COME ON GUYS WORST MECHANICS EVER. SWITCH IT ANDILL GIVEA GOOD REVIEW.
I have to buy the 8 ball to play against the AI should it not come with the game? Other than that it is an amazing game hence the 4 stars
